children.heading: Other Federal regulations
children.label: a Other Federal regulations
children.text: Except as provided in , nothing in this part affects any regulation issued by any agency other than an agency of the Department.section 488f of this title

children.heading: State law
children.label: b State law
children.text: Subject to , this part preempts the laws of any State to the extent that such laws are inconsistent with this part, except that this part shall not preempt any State law that provides additional protection against the acquisition of ammonium nitrate by terrorists or the use of ammonium nitrate in explosives in acts of terrorism or for other illicit purposes, as determined by the Secretary.section 488f of this title
